mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT qi.category FROM eval_question_52 qi WHERE qi.type_id = #{typeId} ORDER BY qi.category
SELECT id, name FROM eval_type_52 WHERE name LIKE '%면담%' ORDER BY name
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_52 WHERE end_at >= GETDATE() AND (evaluator_no = #{empNo} OR evaluatee_no = #{empNo})
